affinity.description: If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

config.description: Allows set configuration for grafana. The properties used to generate grafana.ini. Ref: https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/configuration/

dashboardLabelSelector.description: dashboardLabelSelector allows to query over a set of resources according to labels. The result of matchLabels and matchExpressions are ANDed. An empty label selector matches all objects. A null label selector matches no objects. The parameter is an array of labelSelector objects. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#labelselector-v1-meta

items.description: Selector object for dashboard label selection

dashboardNamespaceSelector.description: dashboardNamespaceSelector allows to query over a set of resources in namespaces that fits label selector. The result of matchLabels and matchExpressions are ANDed. An empty label selector matches all objects. A null label selector matches no objects. The parameter is labelSelector object type. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#labelselector-v1-meta

dataStorage.description: Provides a means to configure the grafana data storage.

accessModes.description: Access modes for the persistent volume claim used for grafana data storage

items.description: Access mode for the persistent volume claim used for grafana data storage

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects

size.description: Size of the persistent volume claim used for grafana data storage

class.description: Storage class name for the persistent volume claim used for grafana data storage

extraVars.description: Allows set extra system environment variables for grafana. The properties used to override values from grafana.ini. Ref: https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/configuration/#configure-with-environment-variables

GF_ANALYTICS_CHECK_FOR_PLUGIN_UPDATES.description: Enable plugin update checks for Grafana analytics

GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_HIDE_VERSION.description: Hide Grafana version when anonymous access is enabled

GF_AUTH_LOGIN_COOKIE_NAME.description: Name of the Grafana login cookie

GF_DASHBOARDS_DEFAULT_HOME_DASHBOARD_PAT.description: Path to the default Grafana home dashboard file

GF_LIVE_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Allowed origins for Grafana live streaming

GF_SECURITY_ANGULAR_SUPPORT_ENABLED.description: Enable Angular support security settings in Grafana

extraVarsSecret.description: Allows set extra system environment variables for Grafana like an extraVars, but set variables into the Secret instead of ConfigMap. If extraVars and ExtraVarsSecret have variables with equals keys, value will be taken from the Secret

grafanaHomeDashboard.description: Allows set custom home dashboard for grafana

image.description:
Grafana image to deploy.
Default: docker.io/grafana/grafana:11.6.5

imageRenderer.description: Allows rendering panels and dashboards to PNGs using a headless browser

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

IGNORE_HTTPS_ERRORS.description: Ignore HTTPS errors in the Grafana image renderer

LOG_LEVEL.description: Log level for the Grafana image renderer

RENDERING_ARGS.description: Command line arguments passed to the Grafana image renderer

image.description:
Grafana image renderer image to deploy.
Default: docker.io/grafana/grafana-image-renderer:3.12.9

install.description: Allow to enable deploy grafana image renderer

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects

name.description: A name of the microservice to deploy with. This name is used as the name of the microservice deployment and in labels

nodeSelector.description: Allow define which Nodes the Pods are scheduled on

priorityClassName.description: If specified, the pod's priorityClassName. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/pod-priority-preemption/#podpriorityclass

resources.description: The resources describes the compute resource requests and limits for single Pods. Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/

limits.description: Limits describe the maximum amount of compute resources allowed

cpu.description: CPU resource limit for Grafana image renderer container

memory.description: Memory resource limit for Grafana image renderer container

requests.description: Requests describe the minimum amount of compute resources required

cpu.description: CPU resource request for Grafana image renderer container

memory.description: Memory resource request for Grafana image renderer container

runAsUser.description:
The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process.
Defaults to user specified in image metadata if unspecified.

fsGroup.description: A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod. If unset, the Kubelet will not modify the ownership and permissions of any volume.

tolerations.description: Tolerations allow the pods to schedule onto nodes with matching taints

ingress.description: Allows create Ingress for Grafana UI via monitoring-operator

install:.description: Allow to enable deploy Ingress for Grafana UI

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects

tlsSecretName.description: Name of the secret with TLS configs for Ingress: tls.crt and tls.key. The secret must exist in the same namespace as Grafana deployment.

image.description:
Grafana operator image to deploy.
Default: quay.io/grafana-operator/grafana-operator:v4.9.0

initContainerImage.description:
A docker image to use for grafana-plugins-init container.
Default: ghcr.io/netcracker/qubership-grafana-plugins-init:main

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects

namespaces.description:
Comma separated list of namespaces to monitor in non-privileged mode.
This parameter is unnecessary if the grafana-operator has ClusterRole on all namespaces.

nodeSelector.description: Allow define which Nodes the Pods are scheduled on

paused.description: Set paused to reconciliation for grafana-operator

interval.description: Scrape interval for the grafana-operator pod monitor

metricRelabelings.description: Metric relabeling rules for the grafana-operator pod monitor

relabelings.description: Endpoint relabeling rules for the grafana-operator pod monitor

scrapeTimeout.description: Please note that scrapeTimeout must be less the interval
